reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para hacer una parada de ida o vuelta de un viaje. Espacioso con mucho lugar para estacionar.

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop on the way to or from a trip. Spacious with plenty of parking.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRMU0zdVRREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy limpios los baños y la atención muy buena,  tanto de las chicas del shop como los chicos de la playa. Mucha variedad de cosas a toda hora, sobre todo cafetería y sandwich muy variados.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were very clean and the service was excellent, both from the shop staff and the beach staff. There was a wide variety of things available at all times, especially the coffee and sandwiches, which were very diverse.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3NExQdVdnEAE
